tasks.title: Menu and navigation foundation setup
tasks.description: Setup the basic menu and navigation structure
tasks.details: Create a basic menu component with navigation links. Use a modern front-end framework such as React or Angular.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit testing and manual verification of menu rendering

tasks.title: Verification form implementation
tasks.description: Implement a verification form for user status flow
tasks.details: Create a verification form with fields for user input. Use a library like Formik or React Hook Form for form management.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit testing and integration testing of form submission and validation

tasks.title: Role-based menu rendering implementation
tasks.details: Create a system to render menus based on user roles. Use a library like React Context or a state management library.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit testing and integration testing of menu rendering for different roles

tasks.title: Admin menu v2 migration
tasks.description: Migrate admin menu from legacy panel to new menu system
tasks.details: Update the admin menu to use the new menu system. Use a migration script or manual update.
tasks.testStrategy: Manual verification of admin menu functionality

tasks.title: Courier and curator menu implementation
tasks.description: Implement menus for courier and curator roles
tasks.details: Create menus for courier and curator roles. Use the role-based menu rendering system.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit testing and integration testing of menu rendering for courier and curator roles

tasks.title: AI curator integration into menu
tasks.description: Integrate AI curator into the menu system
tasks.details: Update the menu system to include AI curator features. Use APIs or SDKs provided by the AI curator service.
tasks.testStrategy: Integration testing of AI curator features in the menu system

tasks.title: Semantic FAQ implementation
tasks.details: Create a semantic FAQ or RAG system. Use a library like Natural Language Processing (NLP) or a knowledge graph database.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit testing and manual verification of FAQ or RAG functionality

tasks.title: Proactive AI alerts implementation
tasks.details: Create a system to send proactive AI alerts. Use a notification service or a messaging platform.
tasks.testStrategy: Integration testing of alert sending and receiving

tasks.title: Menu and navigation testing and validation
tasks.description: Test and validate the menu and navigation system
tasks.details: Perform thorough testing and validation of the menu and navigation system. Use automated testing and manual verification.
tasks.testStrategy: Comprehensive testing and validation of menu and navigation functionality

tasks.title: Documentation and maintenance planning
tasks.description: Plan documentation and maintenance for the menu and navigation system
tasks.details: Create documentation and plan maintenance for the menu and navigation system. Use documentation tools like Markdown or Confluence.
tasks.testStrategy: Manual verification of documentation and maintenance plan
